response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional technical breadth, open-source contributions, and leadership in software craftsmanship, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — key requirements for this executive-level role — and has only basic German proficiency, falling short of the mandatory C1 requirement.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse languages and environments (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Demonstrated mentoring and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, security/compliance, or requirements management
